en: not what you had in mind.
ko: 우리 지금 뭐 하는 거야? 있잖아, 여자 가방 속 물건만 봐도 많은 걸 알 수 있지만, 아마 네가 원하는 건 그게 아니겠지.

en: Mr. Incredible. No, it's all right. I've got him. Sure, you've got him.
ko: 미스터 인크레더블. 아니, 괜찮아. 내가 잡았으니까.

en: I just took him out for you. Sure, you took him out. His attention was on me. A fact I exploited to do my job. My job, you mean. A simple thank you will suffice. Thanks, but I don't need any help.
ko: 그걸 이용해서 내 일을 한 거지. 네 일? 그러니까... 고맙다고 한마디만 하면 되는데.

en: Whatever happened to ladies first? Well, whatever happened to equal treatment? Hey, look, wait. The lady got me first. Well, we could share you. I work alone. Well, I think you need to be more...flexible.
ko: 그럼 남녀평등은 어디 간 건데? 어, 잠깐만. 저 여자가 먼저 날 잡았어.

en: I'm not flexible. I'm flexible. I'm flexible. I'm flexible. I'm flexible. I'm flexible. I'm flexible.
I'm flexible. I'm flexible. I'm flexible. Be more...flexible.
Are you doing anything later? I have a previous engagement.
ko: 나중에 시간 있어? 이미 선약이 있어서.
